title: RandomShtuff
description: The most pointless mod on this entire website. Adds a bunch of unnecessary/unhelpful things to make the game stupendously stupid.
body:
This mod adds a bunch of little things. There is no coherent theme, purpose, or function to this mod, just a bunch of small things. Several examples include-
- Crude Oil which is used to refine into plastic to create other various things
- Explode Command
- You can make sword swords, aka swords made of swords
- Lemons and lemon juice
- Various odd mobs
- Pigs have been returned to their original form, the way the devs intended

The only reason to do this is to have fun. It's especially fun when played with friends.

PLEASE NOTE: THIS MOD IS IN BETA AND CAN BE QUITE UNSTABLE AT TIMES. CREATING A NEW WORLD IS RECCOMENDED UPON INSTALLING THE MOD. THANKS YALL :)
